query: SELECT id, name, JSON_EXTRACT(passportOcrData, '$.koreanName') as koreanName FROM registrations WHERE name LIKE '%DONG%' OR JSON_EXTRACT(passportOcrData, '$.koreanName') LIKE '%동희%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute SELECT id, name, JSON_EXTRACT(passportOcrData, '$.koreanName') as koreanName FROM registrations WHERE name LIKE '%DONG%' OR JSON_EXTRACT(passportOcrData, '$.koreanName') LIKE '%동희%';
